creator: saper@saper.info
text:
Thank you for pointing this out. Looks like they just want to start using "semantic versioning", that is why the format has changed.

https://github.com/html5lib/html5lib-python/blob/b4887f037e47857b4667106cc968ec91d1121140/CHANGES.rst

I do not see any API changes there (apart from the removal of one script), but I'll check.

> pkg rquery %ro py27-html5lib
www/py-flexget
www/py-django-htmlmin
www/py-django-cms
textproc/py-rdflib
www/py-bleach
multimedia/gpodder
games/gogrepo

but I need to check build dependencies as well.
